text:
If it is options I have built with:

  ALSA           : off
        CANBERRA       : off
        DBUS           : on
        DEBUG          : off
        FFMPEG         : on
        JACK           : off
        LIBPROXY       : on
        LTO            : off
        OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS: on
        PROFILE        : on
        PULSEAUDIO     : on
        SNDIO          : off
        TEST           : off
